title: HMAC
description: Native Web Crypto HMAC-SHA1/256/384/512 sign & verify, Base64/Hex/Base64URL output, constant-time compare
disclaimer: Sign & verify runs locally in your browser — keys and messages never leave your machine. Handy for API / webhook debugging.

verify.placeholder: Paste the signature to verify (must match the output encoding above)
verify.hint: Comparison is constant-time and only reports match / mismatch.
